news.headline: Gillette's new campaign, 'The Best Your Game Can Get', features Toronto Raptors player Gradey Dick and NBA Legend Tracy McGrady.
news.summary: In Toronto, Gillette has launched a new campaign titled "The Best Your Game Can Get" with Toronto Raptors’ player Gradey Dick and NBA Legend Tracy McGrady. The campaign showcases Gradey Dick sharing insights on GilletteLabs' cutting-edge grooming technology with Tracy McGrady, his former shooting mentor, inverting the traditional mentor-mentee dynamic. Dick expresses admiration for McGrady's accomplishments and expresses gratitude for the learning experiences gained from him.

news.headline: Realbotix Corp joins AI Partnerships Corp. Affiliate Network, TSX-V: XBOT, Frankfurt Stock Exchange: 76M0.F, OTC: XBOTF.
news.summary: Realbotix Corp. (XBOT) has recently joined the AI Partnerships Corporation Affiliate Network, joining a global group of AI companies to promote collaboration and innovation in artificial intelligence. This move highlights Realbotix's dedication to advancing humanoid robots and AI companionship. The company's stocks are listed on the TSX-V as XBOT, Frankfurt Stock Exchange as 76M0.F, and OTC as XBOTF.

news.headline: Wondersauce wins Best Integrated Campaign award at 2024 MUSE Creative Awards for Dairy Farmers of America.
news.summary: In New York, Wondersauce has been recognized with a gold award for their successful campaign for Dairy Farmers of America. The integrated campaign achieved exceptional results, with significant positive impact on consumer engagement and brand visibility.

news.headline: Aramark (NYSE: ARMK) partners with Asbury Communities to bring SeniorLIFE+ dining services to 5 sites, enhancing resident experience.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, Aramark (NYSE: ARMK) has partnered with Asbury Communities to introduce Aramark's SeniorLIFE+ dining services to five Asbury continuing care retirement communities nationwide. This collaboration aims to enhance life experiences through dining and hospitality services for seniors. Aramark SeniorLIFE+ focuses on offering tailored solutions for hassle-free senior living. This partnership signifies Aramark's commitment to cater to the growing senior population in the market.

news.headline: Carbon Robotics raises $70M in Series D; led by BOND with NVentures, Anthos Capital; total funding now at $157M. Bond's Mood Rowghani joins as partner.
news.summary: Seattle-based Carbon Robotics, known for its AI-driven agricultural solutions, disclosed securing $70 million in Series D funding. The funding round was spearheaded by new investor BOND, along with contributions from established backers including NVentures, Anthos Capital, Fuse Venture Capital, Ignition Partners, Revolution, Sozo Ventures, and Voyager Capital. This latest financing round brings the total company funding to $157 million. As part of this funding, Mood Rowghani, general partner at BOND, will play a key role.

news.headline: Italy Industry Minister: An international group recently told me it wants to invest 30 bln Euros in Italy alone in data centres.
Camping World Holdings, Inc. will announce Q3 fiscal 2024 earnings on Oct 28, 2024, call premarket on Oct 29 at 7:30am CST.
news.summary: Camping World Holdings, Inc. is set to report its third quarter fiscal results for 2024 on October 28. Following this, a conference call will be held on October 29 at 7:30 a.m. Central Time to discuss these results. To participate, interested investors and analysts can dial 844-826-3035. The Company's NYSE ticker symbol is CWH.

news.headline: Volcon CEO John Kim shares UTV product roadmap update in video. (Characters: 69)
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on October 21, 2024, Volcon ePowersports (NASDAQ: VLCN) released a video update with CEO John Kim discussing recent developments in the company's product line.

news.headline: Elevai Biosciences, a subsidiary of Elevai Labs Inc., highlights positive preclinical data for potential obesity treatment with EL-32.
news.summary: Elevai Biosciences, a subsidiary of Elevai Labs Inc., recently showcased promising preclinical findings from the past, demonstrating the potential of their compound EL-32. This compound functions as a dual inhibitor of myostatin and Activin-A, key regulators of muscle growth and regeneration. The data presented emphasized the effective modulation of these pathways, hinting at significant implications for muscle disorders and enhancing muscle mass. This breakthrough has generated significant excitement within the scientific community.

news.headline: Gold exploration company releases technical reports for Novador, McKenzie Break, and Croinor properties under NI 43-101.
Pasinex Resources enters Agreement with Aydin Teknik to potentially acquire Sarikaya lead-zinc license in Turkey.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 21, 2024, Pasinex Resources Limited (CSE: PSE) (FSE: PNX) revealed that Pasinex Arama has signed an Option and Purchase Agreement with Aydin Teknik, a Turkish company. This Agreement could result in Pasinex acquiring 100% ownership of the Sarikaya Property, a Group IV lead-zinc operating license situated in the Kayseri province. The property is not within the scope of the joint venture with the Kurmel Group of companies.

news.headline: SL Green Realty Corp. declares $0.25/month dividend for common stock, $3.00 annualized, payable on 11/15/2024 to shareholders.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, SL Green Realty Corp., the biggest office landlord in Manhattan, disclosed a monthly ordinary dividend of $0.25 per share of common stock. This amount translates to an annualized dividend of $3.00 per share. The dividend will be paid out in cash on November 15, 2024, to shareholders who are on record as of the end of business on October 31, 2024.

news.headline: NanoXplore will host a webcast on Nov 7, 2024, to discuss first quarter results after releasing them on Nov 6, 2024.
news.summary: In Montreal on October 21, 2024, NanoXplore Inc. (TSX: GRA, OTCQX: NNXPF) announced a webcast to review its first quarter performance ending on September 30, 2024. The webcast is scheduled for Wednesday, November 7, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The financial results will be disclosed after the market closes on Tuesday, November 6, 2024.

news.headline: Aveanna to virtually attend Stephens Annual Investment Conference on Nov. 22, 2024 (NASDAQ: AVAH) - ATLANTA, Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. disclosed its participation in the Stephens Annual Investment Conference. The team from Aveanna, listed as AVAH on NASDAQ, is scheduled to engage in virtual 1x1 investor meetings on Friday, November 22, 2024.

news.headline: Global truck cranes market to hit US$14.9 billion by 2033, growing at 5% CAGR. Construction sector to drive sales.
news.summary: The global truck cranes market is expected to grow at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5%, reaching a value of US$ 14.9 billion by 2033, up from US$ 9.1 billion in 2023. The construction sector is predicted to drive the majority of truck crane sales in the next decade. Manufacturers are focusing on integrating multiple operations in equipment to enhance productivity, developing purpose-built chassis to reduce maintenance costs, and combining better-lifting capacities with easier transport for cost-efficiency. Integration of different equipment and technologies is a popular trend among suppliers to increase sales potential. W&W Energy Services introduced the Knuckle Boom Crane Truck by combining the Palfinger 110002 crane with a Kenworth K900 Tractor. Overall, the market is witnessing growth due to rapid industrialization, urbanization, high infrastructure spending, and technological advancements.

news.headline: AMD stock rises ahead of Q3 earnings report on expected market share gains in processors for PCs and servers, also a play in AI chips.
news.summary: Shares of AMD have experienced an increase due to anticipated growth in market share for processors in PCs and servers, with the company positioning itself as an AI chip contender. The question remains, should investors consider purchasing AMD stock before the Q3 earnings release?

news.headline: Article showcases quotes on leadership, motivation, and communication. Features Emily Mortimer and Philippe Petit.
news.summary: Discover powerful quotes from influential figures on the importance of strong leadership, seeking motivation, and building relationships through effective communication. Tap into the wisdom of individuals such as Emily Mortimer, Philippe Petit, and more. Explore their words of inspiration and guidance on leadership and personal growth. This post showcases thought-provoking insights from various leaders and thinkers, offering valuable lessons for individuals looking to enhance their leadership skills and find motivation in their endeavors.

news.headline: SolarEdge gets early certification for Europe's cyber security rules, complying with New Radio Equipment Directive. Compliance expected by August 2025.
news.summary: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc., a leading smart energy technology company based in Milpitas, California, has reported that its range of PV inverters has received early certification and compliance with the European Commission’s New Radio Equipment Directive (RED) Article 3.3 regarding cyber security. This directive is set to be enforced by August 2025 and sets out new regulations for radio equipment. SolarEdge's achievement of this certification demonstrates its dedication to ensuring the security and reliability of its products. The company, listed on the NASDAQ as SEDG, continues to solidify its position as a global leader in the industry.

news.headline: Truelink Capital to acquire GES from Viad Corp in deal, financial terms pending in public release.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Truelink Capital revealed its definitive agreement to acquire GES, a key player in the global exhibition and event sector. The financial details of the deal will be made known through a forthcoming press release from Viad Corp. This acquisition signifies a significant move in the industry and marks a notable development for both companies based in Los Angeles and Las Vegas.

news.headline: Origin Agritech creates consortium "Origin Marker Biological Breeding Service" to speed up GMO/gene editing tech licensing.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Origin Agritech Ltd. (NASDAQ: SEED) disclosed the formation of the "Origin Marker Biological Breeding Service Consortium," a collaboration between the renowned Chinese agricultural technology firm and China. This initiative aims to strengthen biological breeding services.

news.headline: Mynd.ai authorizes $10M share repurchase program for ADS and/or ordinary shares.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Mynd.ai, Inc. (NYSE American: MYND) revealed its plan to repurchase up to $10 million worth of its American depositary shares ("ADSs") and/or ordinary shares. The Board of Directors of Mynd approved this repurchase program, reflecting the Company's strategic financial decision moving forward.

news.headline: Surplus inventory reduces new-car prices slightly, used-car market stabilizes. Stellantis cuts prices, Toyota and Honda see demand rise.
news.summary: In recent news, the automotive industry is experiencing a significant shift with Stellantis brands slashing prices, contrasting the strong demand faced by Toyota and Honda. This update comes from Cars.com Inc. (NYSE: CARS), also known as Cars Commerce, a technology company focused on empowering the automotive sector. The market dynamics reveal a notable adjustment as Stellantis brands introduce price reductions, while Toyota and Honda grapple with high consumer demand. These changes highlight the evolving landscape of the automobile market, showcasing key strategies employed by major players to navigate prevailing trends.

news.headline: Generac awarded $50 million by U.S. Department of Energy for grid resilience, focusing on 100 sites in California.
news.summary: A significant initiative is underway to allocate funds to around 100 locations throughout California, specifically targeting Disadvantaged Communities (DACs). The project, spearheaded by Generac Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GNRC) based in Waukesha, Wisconsin, aims to enhance energy technology solutions. The investment is part of a larger effort to support underserved areas and promote sustainable development.

news.headline: Trevi Therapeutics finishes enrolling for RIVER trial targeting chronic cough; results due Q1 2025. - 91 characters.
news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, Trevi Therapeutics, Inc. based in New Haven, Conn., is anticipating to reveal the topline outcomes. This clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company is focused on advancing the experimental medication Haduvio™ (oral nalbuphine ER) for managing chronic conditions. The company is publicly listed on Nasdaq with the symbol TRVI.

Nevada King Gold extends mineralization by 420m, intercepting 9.1m of 4.32 g/t Au at Wild West Zone, starts Phase III drill program at Atlanta.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 21, 2024, Nevada King Gold Corp. (TSXV: NKG) (OTC: NKGFF) has begun its Phase III drill program with the deployment of a reverse-circulation ("RC") drill. The Company is initiating drilling operations across a specified area.

news.headline: Valvoline Instant Oil Change placed 40th in Franchise Times Top 400. Leader in preventive auto maintenance.
news.summary: Valvoline Inc., a renowned provider of automotive maintenance services, revealed today that its subsidiary, Valvoline Instant Oil Change℠, has secured the 40th position on the prestigious Franchise Times Top 400 list. The ranking places them among the top franchise businesses in the industry. It is a testament to Valvoline Instant Oil Change's reputation as a quick, convenient, and reliable choice for preventive automotive maintenance. This achievement underscores the company's position as a market leader and its commitment to excellence.

news.headline: Acacia Research Corp acquires Deflecto for $103.7 million, a specialty manufacturer serving commercial markets.
news.summary: Acacia Research Corporation (Nasdaq: ACTG) has recently purchased Deflecto Acquisition, Inc. for $103.7 million. The acquisition of Deflecto, a prominent manufacturer in Indianapolis, Indiana, specializing in products for commercial transportation, HVAC, and office markets, falls in line with Acacia's strategy of acquiring and managing businesses in various sectors such as industrial, energy, and technology. This acquisition further strengthens Acacia's portfolio and expands its presence in these key markets.

news.headline: Cameroon construction industry to grow at 6.2% AAGR from 2025-2028 due to public-private investments in infrastructure.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Cameroon Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The construction industry in Cameroon is projected to grow by 5.5% in real terms by 2024. This growth is attributed to increased investments in transport infrastructure, energy, and industrial sectors. The report covers sectors such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets up to 2028. The data is sourced from the National Institute of Sta.

news.headline: INNOCOS Longevity 2025 summit in Miami, FL (March 2-4) brings together beauty and wellness industry, focusing on holistic well-being.
news.summary: A conference called "INNOCOS Longevity Miami" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The event brings together longevity clinics, wellness centers, and beauty and wellness brands to encourage partnerships, drive innovations, and enhance the crucial link between beauty and health. The INNOCOS Summit 2025 highlights that beauty goes beyond the surface and signifies overall well-being. Consumers are looking for more than just superficial solutions.

news.headline: Infermedica recognized as a top Clinical Decision Support company for 2024. Leader in AI-powered health solutions.
news.summary: In Denver on October 21, 2024, Infermedica, a prominent digital health company, was acknowledged as a top company in Clinical Decision Support for 2024. The company is known for its AI-powered solutions used in symptom analysis and patient triage. This recognition came after a comprehensive evaluation process.

news.headline: NORBIT increases share capital to NOK 6,375,002.70 with 63,750,027 shares at NOK 0.10 each for employee purchase program.
news.summary: Trondheim, 21 October 2024: NORBIT ASA acknowledges the previous disclosure made on 1 October 2024 concerning a share offering linked to the employee incentive stock purchase initiative. The recorded share capital escalation linked to the offering is now official in the Norwegian Register of Business Enterprises. The Company's updated share capital now amounts to NOK 6,375,002.70, distributed among 63,750,027 shares, each valued at NOK 0.10.

news.headline: S&P 500 defies odds, nears 6,000 target by end of year; driven by Fed and earnings outlook; may reach 6,600 by end of 2025.
news.summary: The S&P 500 has surpassed critical support levels and is expected to reach 6,000 by the year's end. This rise is fueled by the Federal Reserve indicating lower interest rates and strong earnings outlook. The 6,000 mark is seen as a potential stepping stone to higher highs, with projections suggesting a possible move to 6,600 by the end of next year. Earnings growth is a key driver behind this uptrend, with forecasts remaining strong despite slight moderation.Forecasts for FQ3 2024, FQ4, and the first half of next year stand at 4.1%, 14.2%, and 13.5% respectively, supporting the bullish market sentiment.

news.headline: Rising meat consumption in China is causing health concerns, with obesity rates increasing by 106% since 2000.
Caracal and I2Pure collaborate to launch new antimicrobial products, targeting diverse markets.
news.summary: In ASHBURN, Va., Caracal Products & Services is partnering with I2Pure to introduce innovative products to the market. Caracal, a certified Minority Business Enterprise and Tier 1 diversity spend supplier, specializes in providing a diverse range of products and services to companies, government agencies, and educational institutions. With strong connections in healthcare, insurance, and financial services, Caracal aims to deliver quality solutions.

news.headline: Investors advised to buy Occidental Petroleum Co. (NYSE: OXY) and Microsoft Co. (NASDAQ: MSFT), sell Dollar General Co. (NYSE: DG).
news.summary: The article discusses the tendency of investors to follow successful investors on Wall Street, who are usually net buyers of the market. However, it suggests that other entities worth watching for superior strategies are hedge funds, which play both long and short sides of the stock market. It highlights two stocks to be bullish on - Occidental Petroleum (NYSE: OXY) and Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) due to energy sector's new cycle and tech growth, while recommending avoiding or shorting Dollar General (NYSE: DG) due to its struggling business model. The article mentions Stanley Druckenmiller's short position on U.S. bonds, predicting higher inflation due to rising prices post-COVID-19.

UXLINK governance tokens listed on OKX, BYBIT, and UPBIT with $200 million daily trading volume, boosting liquidity and visibility.
news.summary: In Singapore on October 14, 2024, it was announced that UXLINK has successfully listed its governance tokens on prominent exchanges like OKX, BYBIT, and UPBIT. The daily trading volume for UXLINK tokens has surpassed $200 million. This development is significant as it boosts liquidity, enhances visibility, and improves accessibility for members of the UXLINK community.

news.headline: With the help of dedicated residents, Detroit is rebounding from bankruptcy and flourishing, though challenges persist.
news.summary: This Midwestern city, once the largest in the U.S. to declare bankruptcy, has made significant strides towards recovery. Despite its previous financial struggles, the city is now thriving. However, there are still some challenges that need to be addressed to ensure continued progress.

news.headline: Get ahead in Bored Ape Yacht Club's Dookey Dash: Unclogged with this guide on dominating the game for real rewards.
news.summary: The new game Dookey Dash: Unclogged by Bored Ape Yacht Club offers players an endless runner experience with opportunities to win real prizes. Players can navigate through the sewers and compete for rewards in this exciting game. Follow these tips to dominate the game and increase your chances of winning.

news.headline: OneOncology partners with Southeastern Medical Center to expand cancer care in Eastern North Carolina.
news.summary: A recent partnership has been unveiled between OneOncology, a nationally recognized platform led by physicians that supports independent oncology practices, and Southeastern Medical Center (SMOC), a physician-owned oncology practice based in Goldsboro, N.C. This collaboration, confirmed on October 21, 2024, aims to strengthen oncology services. This strategic alliance highlights the commitment to improving cancer care and is poised to positively impact many individuals.

news.headline: Bombardier begins production of Global 8000 business jet, set for release in 2025, known for being world’s fastest and longest-range private jet, with smooth ride and healthy cabin.
news.summary: In Montreal on October 21, 2024, Bombardier revealed the commencement of manufacturing major structural components for the first Global 8000 production jet. Production is taking place in Bombardier facilities located in Saint-Laurent (Québec), Red Oak (Texas), and Querétaro (Mexico). Expected to be operational in the latter part of 2025, the Global 8000 private jet is poised to hold the distinction as the fastest and longest-range purpose-built business jet globally. Notable for its exceptionally smooth ride and the industry’s most spacious cabin, the aircraft has been performing impressively in flight tests, consistently delivering favorable outcomes.

Proxy advisory firms Glass Lewis and ISS support Terran Orbital's proposed merger, recommending stockholders to vote "FOR." (Characters: 101)
news.summary: Aerospace company Terran Orbital Corporation (NYSE: LLAP) based in Boca Raton, Fla., revealed that independent proxy advisory firms Glass Lewis & Co. and Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) have suggested stockholders to vote in favor of adopting the Agreement and Plan of Merger. The Merger Agreement, dated August 15, 2024, involves Terran Orbital and Lockheed Martin Corporation. The recommendation comes with the backing of key advisory bodies, a significant move in the vote for the merger deal.
